packageRules.description: Intentionally scoped: this repo only auto-tracks curl_cffi (fingerprint freshness). Everything else is disabled so enabling Renovate does not flood the harness with dependency PRs. To broaden later, relax this rule.

curl_cffi is the Chrome-impersonation 'costume' for orca-harness/youtube_capture. Each release ships a newer Chrome TLS/JA3 profile; a frozen version drifts into a stale, detectable fingerprint. Track it deliberately, one reviewed PR at a time.
prBodyNotes: **Manual freshness check before merging.** This bumps the Chrome-impersonation costume (`curl_cffi`). CI cannot verify the on-the-wire fingerprint — that needs a live TLS echo — so confirm it by hand:
2. `pip install -e "../[impersonate]"` (or `pip install -U curl_cffi`) to pull this version.
3. `python verify_fingerprint_v0.py` — confirm it prints a Chrome-class JA3/JA4 distinct from Python's, and that the curl_cffi version reads as current.
Being 1-2 Chrome majors behind is fine; only a long-frozen version is a tell. Background: `orca-harness/youtube_capture/README.md` -> "Keeping the Chrome costume fresh".
